title: Echo Chamber
shortDescription: A first-person puzzle game built in 48 hours for Ludum Dare 54.
fullDescription: Echo Chamber is a first-person puzzle game where sound is both your weapon and your obstacle. Built solo during Ludum Dare 54 (theme: 'Limited Space'), every room evolves based on the audio you generate. Features procedural room-state logic, custom FMOD integration, and a hand-crafted shader for the echo-visualisation effect.

title: Drift Protocol
shortDescription: Arcade space-shooter with physics-based movement and procedural enemy waves.
fullDescription: Drift Protocol is an arcade space-shooter that replaces conventional thrust controls with a physics-driven drift system — inertia is the primary challenge. The game features procedurally generated enemy wave patterns, a combo-multiplier system tied to risk proximity, and a global leaderboard backed by a lightweight serverless function.
